channel.title: Blogs on SuperTsumu
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on SuperTsumu

item.title: revducky
item.description: Home I made a rubber ducky reverse shell for The Hak5 USB Rubber Ducky is a small microcontroller that acts as a keyboard and automatically enters pre-programmed keystrokes. The original Rubber Ducky by Hak5 will cost you 60$. I will be making one for under 10$ with an Arduino pro micro and writing a script to start and conceal a Windows 10 reverse shell. This blog post will be a guide for users with a Linux attacker machine and a Windows 10 Home victim machine.
